# Western Wilson

> Personal site of Western Wilson — software engineer, reader, and explorer. Reflections on technology, engineering, books, and life. Western is Māori, from Aotearoa New Zealand. A generalist and platform engineer by trade, but considers himself mostly a tinkerer chasing threads. Content is personal and opinionated, not a corporate publication.

## Pages

- [Now](/now/): What Western is currently focused on
- [Reflections](/reflections/): Written pieces on software, engineering, and broader observations
- [Books](/books/): Reading log and notes

## Feeds

- [RSS](/index.xml): Full site feed
